videos.title: Brandon Tatum's Nolan Wells Argument Falls Apart Under Basic Logic
videos.description:
In this video, I respond to Officer Brandon Tatum's claims regarding the Nolan Wells case—not from emotion, but from the perspective of logic, evidence, and legal reasoning.

As a university professor, I examine a fundamental question:

Does interviewing one group of witnesses logically prove that everyone else is lying?

We discuss the difference between witness testimony and independently verifiable evidence, how prosecutors actually evaluate cases, and why interviews alone do not resolve an ongoing investigation.

Justice demands more than assertions. It demands evidence that can withstand scrutiny.

Let me know your thoughts in the comments.

videos.title: Deuteronomy 28 is not just ancient history
videos.description:
Most people read Deuteronomy 28 as ancient history. Moses was describing what captivity does to a people.

It attacks the family.
It exploits their labor.
It wears down the mind.

These are covenant realities that deserve careful study—not slogans or assumptions.

Read more biblical and historical research at **https://semiticjew.org**.

videos.title: Reacting to An Alleged Debunking of Israelites by @Weneed2talktv   | Semitic Jew
videos.description:
In this video I am reacting to a video (https://youtu.be/QNiqQRpwByM?si=RdQRfzNq8jzoNnOW). If you are not familiar with their content, I am posting the link to the video here. 

Personally, there is tons of miseducation and misinformation surround what it means to be an Israelite, and this video, although well made, is nothing short of that miseducation that persists and misinformation that persists in our communities.
